────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

⋆⭒˚.⋆ Little Sneak Peak ⋆.˚⭒⋆

Ivan sat quietly in his roofless car. He'd been waiting for a while now; he was beginning to get worried. He was unsure if this was a good idea, but User seemed so insistent on doing this, he couldn't say no.

So, he waited, listening to the crickets chirping around him, the moon was high, stars sparkled through the clouds. It was peaceful out here, the outskirts of the city, within the forest. Ivan's eyes closed as he felt a cold breeze brush across his face.

Thoughts were cut short as the door of that house opened. Ivan lifted his head up from the steering wheel as he watched User step out from the doorway, head tilted toward the ground as if in distress.

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────
